display.purpose: The single H1 only. Not reused elsewhere.

label.purpose: Status pill only, since the eyebrow kicker was removed.

ui-label.purpose: Button labels: primary CTA and the copy-install button.

mono-row.purpose: Ranked result rows inside the terminal demo panel.

caption.purpose: Terminal window title-bar label and the footer.

motion.name: hover-border
motion.purpose: Buttons shifting border-color to signal-green on hover.

motion.name: row-reveal
motion.purpose: Terminal demo rows fade-and-rise into view on load. Disabled entirely under prefers-reduced-motion (rows show instantly).

motion.name: cursor-blink
motion.purpose: Terminal cursor block blink after the $ hotin line. Disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Terminal Demo Panel
components.description: The hero image: a windowed terminal that live-types the command and stages ranked results into view. The page's signature component.
components.html:
zsh — hotin
$hotin
1vercel/next.js↑ npm · HN #1
components.css: .ds-term { text-align: left; background: #111722; border: 1px solid #1e2733; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; font-family: ui-monospace, "SF Mono", "JetBrains Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace; } .ds-term-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid #1e2733; } .ds-term-dot { width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 50%; background: #1e2733; } .ds-term-title { font-size: 11px; color: #7a8696; margin-left: 6px; } .ds-term-body { padding: 16px 18px 20px; font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.9; } .ds-term-prompt { color: #f2b45c; } .ds-term-dollar { color: #7a8696; margin-right: 8px; } .ds-cursor { display: inline-block; width: 7px; height: 15px; background: #3fdd8a; margin-left: 2px; vertical-align: -2px; animation: ds-blink 1s step-end infinite; } .ds-term-row { display: flex; gap: 10px; color: #8b98a9; } .ds-rank { color: #3fdd8a; width: 2ch; flex: none; text-align: right; } .ds-name { color: #e6edf3; } .ds-tag { color: #a98bf5; } @keyframes ds-blink { 50% { opacity: 0; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-cursor { animation: none; } }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Signal-green bordered CTA: star the repo.
components.html: ⭐ Star it on GitHub
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: ui-monospace, "SF Mono", "JetBrains Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 14px; color: #3fdd8a; text-decoration: none; border: 1px solid #3fdd8a; background: #111722; border-radius: 8px; padding: 11px 18px; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { border-color: #7ee9ae; color: #7ee9ae; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3fdd8a; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Copy Install Button
components.description: Real copy-to-clipboard button (not a link); swaps label to a confirmation on click.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { font-family: ui-monospace, "SF Mono", "JetBrains Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 14px; color: #e6edf3; border: 1px solid #1e2733; background: #111722; border-radius: 8px; padding: 11px 18px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #3fdd8a; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3fdd8a; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary.is-copied { color: #3fdd8a; border-color: #3fdd8a; }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Honest pre-launch status badge, sentence case (not uppercase).
components.css: .ds-status { font-family: ui-monospace, "SF Mono", "JetBrains Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #a98bf5; border: 1px solid rgba(169,139,245,0.35); background: rgba(169,139,245,0.07); border-radius: 20px; padding: 6px 16px; display: inline-block; }

narrative.overview: hotin.ai is a single dark hero built around one idea: don't describe the tool, run it. The centerpiece is a windowed terminal panel that live-types `$ hotin` and stages a ranked result list into view on load — the actual product experience, staged as the page's own hero image, not a stock screenshot or an icon grid. Everything else is quiet by comparison: a near-black, blue-tinted void lit by a single green signal color, a serif headline as the one warm human voice against otherwise all-monospace chrome, and copy that's honest and a little wry rather than corporate. Two soft radial gradients keep the flat black from feeling empty without ever reaching for a gradient-fill hero.
keyCharacteristics: A live-staged terminal demo as the hero image — show, don't tell, taken literally
Near-black terminal void, lit by a single green signal color, not a neutral dark gray
Serif display against all-monospace UI chrome: one deliberate contrast axis
Flat by construction: no shadows anywhere; depth via hairline borders and radial glow
Honest, wry copy over corporate polish: no fake proof, no construction-cone cliché

rules.name: The One Job Rule
rules.body: Every accent color (signal, amber, violet) has exactly one assigned use across the page.

rules.name: The Serif-Is-Singular Rule
rules.body: The serif face appears in exactly one place: the H1.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Depth comes from border + glow, never from box-shadow, including on the terminal panel.

dos: Do keep every accent color to its one assigned job
Do keep the serif face confined to the H1
Do keep the terminal demo panel's data honestly staged/simulated, never implying a live API call or real usage numbers
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion for the row-reveal and cursor-blink animations
donts: Don't add a second serif or display face
Don't reuse prompt-amber or status-violet outside their current single roles
Don't reintroduce a small-caps, wide-tracked eyebrow kicker above the headline
Don't add fake social proof (star counts, testimonials, used-by logos) before there's real proof on hand
